name: Oysters Rockefeller
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the spinach, onion tops, and parsley until fine.
2. Mix with celery, melted butter, and lemon juice.
3. Half fill 6 pie plates with rock salt.
4. Place 6 oysters on half shell in each plate; cover each oyster with 1 teaspoon of vegetable mixture.
5. Place plates under broiler; cook until edges of oysters curl, then serve immediately.
